prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the entire photo into a whimsical handmade needle-felt / wool-felt miniature diorama. Preserve the original composition, selfie camera angle, perspective, pose, subject placement, outfit, facial expression, hairstyle, lighting direction, and recognizable setting, but reinterpret every surface as soft felted wool with visible fibers, plush seams, rounded handmade edges, and miniature craft textures. Keep the foreground arm, bracelet, main person, background companion, long arched-column interior, warm amber lighting, and distant visitors in the same relative positions. Convert the architecture into felt columns and arches with stitched stone-block details and colorful felt trim; convert the floor, railings, plants, lights, and background figures into tiny handcrafted diorama pieces. Maintain the same shallow depth of field and tilted wide-angle selfie feel, with soft bokeh and cozy toy-like realism. Do not add text, logos, or extra characters beyond the people already present in the reference.
